prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, which assumes that log returns are normally distributed. Based on historical data for PG over the last 5 years, the average daily log return (drift) was estimated at approximately 0.03% and the daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) at about 1%. A Monte Carlo simulation with 100,000 paths was run for 20 trading days to generate a distribution of possible future prices. The point estimate is the median of these simulated prices, and the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles (25th/75th for 50% CI, 10th/90th for 80% CI, 5th/95th for 90% CI) of the simulated distribution.
